notes: Seems to be working fine, but it's not possible to run it in fullscreen. Just like Larry 1-3. Use alt+enter switch to windowed mode.
title: Leisure Suit Larry 5 - Passionate Patti Does a Little Undercover Work

notes: Seems to work only in Fullscreen with nice scaled screen when using a newer version of ScummVM. Download a newer version e.g. here https://www.scummvm.org/frs/scummvm/2.0.0/scummvm-2.0.0-win32.zip and replace all files in the game subfolder "scummvm". Afterwards game works perfectly fine.
title: Leisure Suit Larry 5 - Passionate Patti Does a Little Undercover Work
